rationale: Acting on either produces essentially the same resulting PR: removal of the True-stub ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup (and their vacuous theorems), deferral or placeholder marking of the vacuous IsUnipotent (per the shared roadmap warning), and splitting of the bundled AffineAlgGroup class. The two additional Review 2 points (AlgPoints specialization; IsUnipotent arg type) are real but secondary and would not create a meaningfully better final state than Review 1's fixes alone; both correctly flag the identical scope violations against the diff and roadmap.
